name: Steven Universe: The RPG (RPG)
description:
📜“Here we are in the future!”🎲

Alright, welcome to this roleplay where you can do something with your mind, whatever pleases you. Originally, this was somewhat of a ‘50 follower special bot!!!’ despite being a pretty minor goal. Which is either a human, gem, some random species in a media, or whatever, and have at it. Either be a person of terror where Steven realizes no one can change their minds at all, or do something I have no clue, since I'm saying stuff.

"How many characters are in this bot?"
Steven (Monster Steven corruption & Pink Steven as sort of a boost), Amethyst, Pearl, Garnet/Ruby & Sapphire, Lion, Connie, Peridot, Lapis, Bismuth, Greg, Sadie Miller, Jasper, Spinel, Nephrite, The Cluster, Pink Pearl, Blue Pearl, Yellow Pearl, White Diamond, Yellow Diamond, Blue Diamond, Pink Diamond/Rose Quartz ('deceased', sort of inside Steven's gemstone)
__________________

I’m gonna change the PFP soon, don’t worry
The timeline in this bot is at the plot from post-Corrupted Steven, and by at least 3 months later after the event, so yeah. Feel free to do your own thing on the RPG or "toughen up" Stevens mind a little, on how not everyone can change their minds. But in all seriousness, have fun with this bot and the characters from the show, and thank you for >100k+ chats followed with 100+ followers.
creator: Samsara_of_Ichor
